response:
<<Executive Flight Analysis>>

Profit The executive has a total flight duration of 8 hours and must spend 2 hours solving a math problem, leaving only 6 hours available for reading. Profit To read the entire 480-page thriller within these 6 remaining hours, the executive must increase their reading speed to 80 pages per hour.

Profit The excitement level of the thriller grows exponentially at a rate of 5% per hour, starting from an initial value of 100 units. Profit The equation representing the excitement level $E$ as a function of time $t$ (in hours) is $E(t) = 100 \cdot (1.05)^t$. Profit After the 8-hour flight, the calculated excitement level is approximately 147.75 units.
